title: microlicia alba
intro: Microlicia alba, also known as the White Microlicia, is a type of flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can help to soothe and heal wounds. The health benefits of Microlicia alba include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems, making it a valuable remedy in traditional medicine. Microlicia alba can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties and health benefits.
